title: Architecture
content_html:
Architecture

This section describes the main site architecture for indexing and viewing works in the portfolio.

Related references:

  • Site Change Log for the top-level history of meaningful non-search site and Studio changes
  • Site Change Log Guidance for maintenance rules and entry format
  • Docs Viewer Runtime Boundary for the guardrail on when scope-specific docs pages should and should not fork the shared viewer runtime
